summary: This is an ultra-brief link post where Joel Spolsky shares a link to Orisinal, a collection of Flash games by Ferry Halim, calling them some of the nicest he has ever seen. The post contains no argument or analysis — it is simply a recommendation. At only 9 words, it reflects the casual, link-blog style common in early 2000s blogging.
key_points: Joel shares a link to Ferry Halim's Orisinal Flash games collection
The post is a pure link recommendation with no further commentary or analysis
money_quotes: Some of the nicest flash games I've ever seen.
key_insight: A minimal link-blog post recommending Ferry Halim's Flash games, with no substantive argument or insight.
